channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: All About Red Gerard's Relationship with His Girlfriend Olympic Snowboarder Hailey Langland
item.description: Red Gerard and Hailey Langland have been dating since they were in their teens

item.title: Chrissy Teigen Jokes That Her Kids Are 'More Judgmental' and Mock Her Food Since She Joined “Star Search” (Exclusive)

item.title: Luke Thompson and Yerin Ha Are All Dressed Up as “Bridgerton” Goes to Madrid, Plus Florence Pugh, Amanda Seyfried and More
item.description: From Madrid to New York City, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Happy Birthday, Vanna White! See the “Wheel of Fortune” Hostess' Sweetest Photos with Her 2 Kids Nikko and Gigi
item.description: The iconic game show personality, who turns 69 on Feb. 18, 2026, welcomed her two children in 1994 and 1997

item.title: Prince William Says You Have to 'Learn to Love and Understand Yourself' as He Discusses His Own Mental Health 'Tools'
item.description: The Prince of Wales appeared as a surprise guest on BBC Radio 1 on Feb. 18, talking about mental health challenges and male suicide
